# MacDevice Sample

This page is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/mngdmac_v1beta1_macdevice.yaml`.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Resource | `mngdmac/MacDevice` |
| API Version | `mngdmac.oracle.com/v1beta1` |
| Source Path | `config/samples/mngdmac_v1beta1_macdevice.yaml` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# MacDevice is bind-existing and terminate-only in this rollout.
# Provide the owning MacOrder OCID plus the existing MacDevice UUID.
# Kubernetes delete maps to TerminateMacDevice.
#
apiVersion: mngdmac.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: MacDevice
metadata:
  name: macdevice-sample
spec:
  macOrderId: ocid1.macorder.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  macDeviceId: example-mac-device-uuid
```
